caption: The video captures a sequence of an aircraft taxiing on a runway. The plane, adorned with a distinctive livery featuring a purple stripe and a logo near the cockpit, is moving steadily along the tarmac. Its landing gear is fully extended, indicating it has either just landed or is preparing for takeoff. In the background, several other aircraft tails are visible, each marked with the Russian flag, suggesting this scene takes place at a Russian airport. The overcast sky and wet runway hint at recent or ongoing rainy weather conditions, adding to the atmosphere of the scene. The camera remains stationary, providing a clear view of the aircraft as it moves across the frame.
